{{Quote|Where do you think you are going with that blaster, young lady? Come back here and introduce yourself to handsome Baron Bertrum|Lady Agatha|<<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>}}
[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] '''Bertrum''' was a noble of an unknown [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Agatha]] considered him a handsome man and an appropriate suitor for one of the young nobles in her charge.<ref name="LOTE" />

==Sources==
